title: Junior Data Analyst (Databricks)
description:
InfoCepts is a global leader of end-to-end data & analytics solutions with nearly 20 years of experience, also named as Gartner’s 2020, 2021 and 2022 customers’ choice for Data & Analytics providers. We continue to grow rapidly year over year, now employing more than 1,200 people in offices across the globe. As we have grown, we have stayed true to our mission—to always help our customers stay modern that help them make smart, data-driven decisions. Since 2004, we have deployed hundreds of high performance analytics applications over web and mobile platforms, built several advanced analytics models, processed petabytes of data using Big Data technologies and delivered several high impact business solutions. Driven by our vision of delivering great customer experiences, we are looking for professionals who are passionate about making the world a better place by leveraging the power of data.

We are hiring aspiring / proven data analyst to join us.

Roles and Responsibilities:

  • Design, build, and maintain interactive dashboards and reports
  • Develop and optimize SQL queries to extract, transform, and analyze data from various data sources
  • Perform data analysis and automation using Python
  • Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather, understand, and document reporting and analytics requirements
  • Translate business requirements into technical specifications and BI solutions
  • Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and performance across dashboards and reports
  • Support data validation, testing, and ongoing enhancement of BI assets
  • Provide insights and recommendations based on data analysis to support business objectives
  • Maintain documentation for dashboards, data models, and reporting logic

Skills Required:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent work experience).
  • Open to fresh graduates with relevant internship experience
  • Experience in Databricks
  • Experience in Tableau/PowerBi dashboard development
  • Strong proficiency in SQL for data querying and analysis
  • Working knowledge of Python for data analysis and automation
  • Experience in requirements gathering and stakeholder engagement
  • Ability to translate business questions into data-driven solutions
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

postedCompany.description: InfoCepts is a leading provider of Information Management and Business Analytics services. Our customers include large global enterprises, data syndicators, and leading software companies. Since 2004, we have deployed hundreds of high performance analytics applications over web and mobile platforms, built several advanced analytics models, processed petabytes of data using Big Data technologies and delivered several high impact business solutions. Driven by our vision of delivering great customer experiences, we are looking for professionals who are passionate about making the world a better place by leveraging the power of data.
